neutralConcepts: CONSENT_GATE entry written for ALL outcomes: GRANTED, DENIED, PENDING, WITHDRAWN
T368–T374 blocked unless CONSENT_GATE outcome is GRANTED
Missing CONSENT_GATE entry = fail-closed (treated as DENIED)

ironRules.rule: CF-461: Must write CONSENT_GATE entry for ALL outcomes
storeDocument BEFORE emit. Fail-closed: missing entry = DENIED
